case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. ZOILA AREVALO DE CHAVEZ

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-26-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JAN-21-2020 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-26-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JAN-21-2020 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY NARALLANI SANCHEZ, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT ZOILA AREVALO DE CHAVEZ IS NOT PRESENT. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT. DEFENDANT AGREES TO MAKE $100 PAYMENTS A MONTH FOR 10 MONTHS AND $300 A MONTH PAYMENT FOR 5 MONTHS. THE FIRST PAYMENT OF $100 WILL BE DUE ON JUN-28-2019. PARTIES MUST APPEAR AT THE JAN-21-2020 HEARING IF NO PAYMENTS ARE MADE. IF NO APPEARANCE CASE WILL BE CONTINUED FOR 6 MONTHS UNTIL THE END DATE OF SEPT-2020. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
ORDER RE:CONTINUANCE FOR PROGRESS REPORT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-09-2020 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO AUG-25-2020 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-25-2020 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO JAN-26-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 W. TRUPEK (506)
